{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sha Siris
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sha Siris]] is a baby Sha.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
